# doris_routine_load_sensor

## Purpose

Watch Apache Doris Routine Load jobs (Kafka→Doris continuous ingestion) for state changes. Emits AssetObservation on healthy resumption + AssetMaterialization + RunRequest on PAUSED / CANCELLED / STOPPED states.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `sensor_name` | `str` | Unique sensor name. |
| `database` | `str` | Doris database to watch. |
| `job_name_target` | `str` | Dagster job to trigger when an unhealthy state is detected. |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `host_env_var` | `str` | `"DORIS_FE_HOST"` | Env var with Doris FE host. |
| `username_env_var` | `str` | `"DORIS_USER"` | Env var with username. |
| `password_env_var` | `str` | `"DORIS_PASSWORD"` | Env var with password. |

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `asset_key` | `str` | — | Optional asset key for the destination table. Sensor emits AssetObservation (default — Routine Load is an external ingestion path; observation is the right shape) on state changes. |

### Sensor configuration

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `job_name` | `str` | — | Specific Routine Load job name. If unset, watches all jobs in the database and fires an event per state change observed. |
| `minimum_interval_seconds` | `int` | `60` | Seconds between polls. |
| `default_status` | `str` | `"running"` | 'running' or 'stopped'. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `query_port` | `int` | `9030` | Doris MySQL-protocol query port. |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML

```yaml
type: dagster_community_components.DorisRoutineLoadSensorComponent
attributes:
  sensor_name: doris_orders_rl_health
  database: analytics
  job_name: orders_rl
  host_env_var: DORIS_FE_HOST
  query_port: 9030
  username_env_var: DORIS_USER
  password_env_var: DORIS_PASSWORD
  job_name_target: alert_oncall_job
  asset_key: doris/analytics/events_realtime
```
